title: RECONSTITUTION OF INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE
full_text:
# [Attachment: बीमा सलाहकार समिति का पुनर्गठन _ RECONSTITUTION OF INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE, Feb2021.pdf]

रजिसरी सं. डी.एल.- 33004/99 

REGD. No. D. L.-33004/99 



xxxGIDHxxx सी.जी.-डी.एल.-अ.-12022021-225120 **xxxGIDExxx CG-DL-E-12022021-225120** 

असाधारण **EXTRAORDINARY** 

भाग **III** — खण ड **4 PART III—Section 4** <mark>पाजधकार स</mark> पकाजित **PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY** 

सं. **65]** नई कदलली, िुकिार, फरिरी 12, 2021 /माघ 23, 1942 **No.  65] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 12, 2021/MAGHA  23, 1942** 

भारतीय बीमा जिजनयामक और जिकास पाजधकरण 

अजधसूचना 

हैदराबाद, 10 फरिरी, 2021 

# बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत 

फा. सं. भा.बी.जि.जि.पा./ बी.स.स./1/173/2021 **.—** बीमा जिजनयामक और जिकास प्राजधकरण अजधजनयम, 1999 (1999 का 41) की धारा 25 की उप-धारा (1) द्वारा प्रदत्त िजियों का प्रयोग करते हुए : प्राजधकरण इसके द्वारा जनम्नजलजखत अजधसूचना िारी करता है 

श्री सौरभ जमश्रा, संयुि सजचि, जित्तीय सेिाएं जिभाग को श्री लजलत कुमार चंदेल, आर् क सलाहकार , जित्तीय सेिाएं जिभाग के स्ट्थान पर बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत के सदस्ट्य के रूप में जनयुि ककया िाता है, िो फा. सं. भा.बी.जि.जि.प्रा./बी.स.स./8/159/2019 कदनांक 12 िुलाई, 2019 के अनुसार पुनगगठित बीमा सलाहकार सजमजत के एक सदस्ट्य थे । 

डॉ . सुभाष सी. खुंठिआ, अध्यक्ष [ जिज्ञापन- III/4/ असा. **/** 500/2020-21] 

890 GI/2021 

(1) 

2 

THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY 

<u>[PART III—SEC.4]</u> 

## **INSURANCE REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** 

## **NOTIFICATION** 

Hyderabad, the 10th February, 2021 

## **INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE** 

**F. No. IRDAI/IAC/1/173/2021** .—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), the Authority hereby makes the following notification: 

Shri. Saurabh Mishra, Joint Secretary, Department of Financial Services is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee in place of Shri. Lalit Kumar Chandel, Economic Adviser, Department of Financial Services who was one of the member of the Insurance Advisory Committee reconstituted vide Notification F. No. IRDAI/IAC/8/159/2019 dated 12<sup>th</sup> July, 2019. 

Dr. SUBHASH C. KHUNTIA, Chairman 

[ADVT - III/4/Exty. **/** 500/2020-21] 

Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. ## **INSURANCE REGULATORY AND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF INDIA** 

## **NOTIFICATION** 

Hyderabad, the 10th February, 2021 

## **INSURANCE ADVISORY COMMITTEE** 

**F. No. IRDAI/IAC/1/173/2021** .—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 25 of the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 1999 (41 of 1999), the Authority hereby makes the following notification: 

Shri. Saurabh Mishra, Joint Secretary, Department of Financial Services is appointed as Member of the Insurance Advisory Committee in place of Shri. Lalit Kumar Chandel, Economic Adviser, Department of Financial Services who was one of the member of the Insurance Advisory Committee reconstituted vide Notification F. No. IRDAI/IAC/8/159/2019 dated 12<sup>th</sup> July, 2019. 

Dr. SUBHASH C. KHUNTIA, Chairman
